memory:memory/2026-04-30.md:1:12.snippet: ## 2026-04-30 - Scott clarified the long-term versioning strategy: - V11 (and future V12, etc.) is the **"embryo"** (the source code from which all other versions are born). Structural changes and new features happen here first. - V20 is the base beta blank version, derived from the embryo. - V30 is the live sandbox Scott will use to set up a real company (Vet clinics). Content changes happen here via the UI. - V40+ will be industry-specific variations derived from V20 (e.g., V40 for accountants, V50 for physios). - Urgent bug fixes can be applied directly to V20/V30 and backported to the embryo. - S2 (Wire V20 Setup to SQLite) is actively running in a sub-agent.
